events.summary: Alex Duong, an actor and comedian known for his work on "Blue Bloods," died Saturday, according to an update on a GoFundMe page started last year to support him and his family during his cancer treatment.

events.title: Usha Vance on disagreements with JD Vance, 2028 and shopping at Costco
events.summary: Second lady Usha Vance, who was registered as a Democrat until at least 2014, told NBC News she sometimes has thoughts that are "idiosyncratic" and don't fit neatly with one political party.

events.title: Tracking Iran's military attacks on its neighbors
events.summary: After nearly four weeks of heavy bombardment by U.S. and Israeli forces, Iran is still able to assail its Persian Gulf neighbors and Israel with daily missile and drone attacks.

events.title: Oil prices jump, U.S. markets open higher as Iran war rounds one month
events.summary: Global oil prices jumped overnight and U.S. stock indexes gained after a weekend that saw Iran-backed Houthi militants launch ballistic missiles at Israel.

events.title: Trump says he wants Iran's oil and could seize Kharg Island
events.summary: President Donald Trump said Sunday that he would like to "take the oil in Iran" and is considering seizing the export hub of Kharg Island, which is responsible for more than 90% of Iran's oil exports

events.title: Iran says it's 'waiting' for possible U.S. ground assault as 3,500 troops arrive in Gulf
events.summary: Iran has said it is ready to face U.S. troops on the ground, accusing Washington of secretly planning an assault while seeking negotiations to end the war.“The enemy, openly, sends messages of negotiation and dialogue, but secretly is planning a ground attack,” Iran’s parliament speaker, Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said on Sunday, according to state media outlet IRNA and state-affiliated Tasnim

events.title: President Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran
events.summary: President Trump spoke to reporters on Air Force One and claimed that "regime change" has happened in Iran since the conflict began and that it was imperative.

events.title: Energy disruptions from Iran war trigger sprawling oil shortages across Asia
events.summary: Parts of Asia face long gas lines and rationing, with some countries even declaring national emergencies without the consistent flow of oil and gas amid the ongoing Iran war. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer details the impact across the continent.

events.title: Remains of French musketeer d'Artagnan may have been found in Dutch church
events.summary: The skeleton of famed French musketeer Charles de Batz de Castelmore d’Artagnan may have been found in front of a church altar in the Dutch city of Maastricht, church officials and an archaeologist said.

events.title: U.S. stocks suffer biggest loss since the war with Iran started
events.summary: U.S. stocks suffered their biggest loss since the war with Iran started, fueled by rising oil prices and fears over when the war will end. NBC News’ Monica Alba and Matt Bradley detail Trump’s latest comments and latest in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Left in limbo, Afghans who served with the U.S. fear Trump could send them back to the Taliban
events.summary: On a former U.S. military base in Qatar, Afghans who supported the United States in its 20-year war against the Taliban have been left in limbo, living in windowless shipping containers far from the new lives they were once promised in the U.S.Now, the Trump administration is presenting them with a stark choice: move to an unspecified third country or return to Taliban-ruled Afghanistan, where they potentially face persecution, imprisonment or death

events.title: 'We don't sleep': Sailors stranded in Persian Gulf as rockets fly overhead
events.summary: Iran’s blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has trapped the largely invisible workforce that keeps the world’s maritime trade afloat, with 20,000 sailors stuck on their vessels.

events.title: Trump might be eyeing Iran's Kharg Island. Here's why that's a risk.
events.summary: The U.S. could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island, an offshore terminal which 90% of its crude oil exports pass.

events.title: Cockroaches, surveillance and 16-hour days: The life of a North Korean worker in Russia
events.summary: Workers at Russian construction sites are among more than 100,000 North Koreans being exploited worldwide as part of a state-sponsored labor program, researchers say in a new report.

events.title: Israeli police block Catholic figures from Palm Sunday Mass at Jerusalem's Holy Sepulchre
events.summary: World leaders have voiced concern after Israeli police prevented Cardinal Pierbattista Pizzaballa, the Latin patriarch of Jerusalem, from entering the Church of the Holy Sepulchre on Sunday

events.title: Netanyahu says Israel will widen invasion of southern Lebanon
events.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Sunday that Israel’s military will widen its ground campaign in southern Lebanon

events.title: Body found in Colombia amid search for missing U.S. flight attendant
events.summary: Colombian officials discovered a body Friday amid the search for a U.S. flight attendant who went missing in the country last weekend

events.title: Ukraine battles a brutal Russian offensive as Iran war takes the world's focus
events.summary: With the world’s attention shifting to the escalating conflict in the Middle East, Russia is pushing forward with a spring offensive in Ukraine despite months of peace talks that no longer appear to be Washington’s priority.

events.title: Russia took satellite images of U.S. air base before Iranian attack, Zelenskyy says
events.summary: Russia took satellite images of a U.S. airbase in Saudi Arabia three times in the days before Iran attacked the site and wounded American troops.

events.title: Fears Israel could replicate its 'Gaza model' in Lebanon
events.summary: Bridges blown up.

events.title: Iran-backed Houthis fire missile at Israel from Yemen, risking further escalation
events.summary: The Yemen-based Houthi militant group claimed responsibility for an attack on Israel on Saturday, marking the Iran-backed group’s entry into the widening conflict in the Middle East, one that could further disrupt the region’s vital shipping lanes

events.title: No end to war in sight after one month as Iran squeezes global economy
events.summary: Pne month into the war, perhaps only one outcome is certain: Immense damage to the global economy.

events.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran

events.title: U.N. experts demand Israel release prominent Gaza doctor after reports of 'severe torture'
events.summary: United Nations experts are calling for Israel to immediately release Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya, a prominent doctor from the Gaza Strip who has been held without charge for more than a year, saying they had received reports that he's endured "severe torture."

events.title: 'Oh, golly': Britain's embattled Starmer navigates Trump's Iran war ire
events.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer likely won't fire back insults at President Donald Trump, those close to him say.

events.title: In China, a rush to 'raise lobsters' quickly leads to second thoughts
